title: KLA ANNOUNCES JUNE 2022 INVESTOR DAY
text: MILPITAS, Calif. , March 29, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- KLA Corporation (NASDAQ: KLAC) today announced that it will host an investor day on Thursday, June 16, 2022.

title: KLA (KLAC) Gains But Lags Market: What You Should Know
text: KLA (KLAC) closed at $352.61 in the latest trading session, marking a +0.48% move from the prior day.

title: Is KLA Corp A Good Dividend Stock Choice? What Investors Should Consider
text: KLAC's expertise in its core market, a growing portfolio of subscription services, relentless R&D commitment, elite profitability, well-controlled gearing, and strong CF conversion all provide the foundation for its distributions.
